pages.text: Weavers Paradise is a mod about making clothing, but before we get into the interesting stuff we have to get our hands dirty. $(br2)Let's get to know primary materials first, and how to process them for later use
Spinning Jenny is a crafting station needed to process raw materials into spools.

pages.title: Cotton
pages.text: Crafted from x4 $(l:weaversparadise:getting_started/plants#cotton)Raw Cotton$(/l). Has average properties and is the easiest to obtain.

pages.title: Wool
pages.text: Crafted from x1 of any Wool. Has the most durability of all materials.

pages.title: Silk
pages.text: Crafted from x5 String. Has the least durability.

pages.title: Jeans
pages.text: Crafted from x4 of Cotton Spool. Has average properties.

pages.title: Temperature
pages.text: Weavers Paradise also supports some temperature mods. Currently:$(br)$(bold)> Cold Sweat$(br)$(bold)> Legendary Survival Overhaul
It adds these properties to materials:$(br)$(bold)Cotton$() - average protection against both heat and cold$(br)$(bold)Silk$() - protection against heat$(br)$(bold)Wool$() - protection against cold
